title: Waste and contaminant indicators - Canada.ca
content:
## Waste and contaminant indicators
Waste and contaminant indicators track the presence and impact of waste and pollutants, supporting the transition to a circular economy.
- Municipal wastewater treatment (updated September 2025)
- Plastic particles in the northern fulmar (updated May 2025)
- Solid waste diversion and disposal (updated October 2024)
- Bisphenol A in water and sediment (new July 2020)
- Perfluorooctane sulfonate in fish and water (updated January 2019)
- Polybrominated diphenyl ethers in fish and sediment (updated January 2020)
- Emissions of harmful substances to air (updated August 2025)
- Releases of harmful substances to water (updated August 2025)
- Human exposure to harmful substances (updated October 2023)
- Marine oil spills (updated March 2025)
- Restoring the Great Lakes Areas of Concern (updated September 2025)
- Risk to soil and water quality from agriculture (updated August 2016)
Emissions of harmful substances to air
Releases of harmful substances to water
